top_patterns.pattern_name: Opening with a personal reflection or question
top_patterns.description: Starts with a personal thought, question, or observation to engage followers.
example_quotes: Some days the beauty of this world just humbles me beyond comprehension.
Thanks for playing along with our shuberX #AprilFools prank!

top_patterns.description: Describes a recent event, trip, or activity, often with a call to action or question.
top_patterns.structure_template: First-person + activity/venue + question or call to action
example_quotes: Back in one of my favorite cities to showcase the @TOMS optical collection.
Just arrived at #camptoms and love the flags.

top_patterns.description: Shares enthusiasm or thanks, often with a mention of partners or team.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Common in milestone or collaborative posts
example_quotes: Thanks to the amazing @TOMS team who helped run our #tomsroastingco.
I couldn’t be more excited to introduce TOMS Roasting Co.
What will you do to see change in the world?
About to take the stage at #SXSW.
Thanks for playing along with our shuberX prank!

closers: What will you do to see change in the world?
language_habits.line_break_style: Minimal line breaks, often single paragraph or sentence

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Creates intimacy and authenticity, invites followers into personal experience
example_quotes: Some days the beauty of this world just humbles me beyond comprehension.
I couldn’t be more excited to introduce TOMS Roasting Co.

voice_tells.tell: Use of questions or calls to action
example_quotes: What will you do to see change in the world?
Are you in NYC? Stop by to hang out!

anti_patterns: Overly promotional language without personal touch
Excessive hashtags or links without context
Lack of personal voice or emotion

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Consistent personal, engaging, and event-focused tone with emphasis on gratitude and community.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift toward more direct calls to action and personal reflection, less formal or corporate language.
